title: Alsophila adspersa
taxonomy: Alsophila adspersa is a species of tree fern in the family Cyatheaceae. It is native to Australia. Alsophila adspersa is classified as a flowering plant, more specifically a vascular plant belonging to the group known as the euphyllophytes. Euphyllophytes are further classified into two groups: the ferns and the gymnosperms are not, but the euphyllophytes are divided into two groups: the monilophytes (ferns) and the sphenophytes, however Alsophila adspersa is in the monilophytes (ferns). Alsophila adspersa is classified within the division Pteridophyta.
